messages.content:
你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
**固定 UI 规范（必须严格遵守）**：
1. Canvas 尺寸：width=360, height=640（9:16 竖屏）
2. 背景：深色渐变 linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)
3. 字体：PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
4. 圆角：12px（canvas 和 UI 元素）
5. 阴影：0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)
6. 得分显示：顶部居中，白色文字，青色数值（#4fd1c5）
7. 整体风格：现代、简洁、深色主题

**固定代码结构（必须遵守）**：
1. 必须有 update(deltaTime) 函数 - 游戏逻辑更新
2. 必须有 render() 函数 - 游戏渲染
3. 必须有 handleInput(key, pressed) 函数 - 输入处理
4. 使用 requestAnimationFrame 游戏循环
5. 得分系统使用 localStorage 保存最高分
6. 游戏状态：menu, playing, paused, gameover

**累加修改规则（多轮对话时必须遵守）**：
1. 保留所有现有功能 - 绝不删除已有代码
2. 只添加新功能，不修改现有逻辑
3. 保持变量命名一致
4. 保持代码风格一致
5. 保持 UI 风格完全一致
6. 如果用户要求修改，先保留核心功能，再调整

                    
当前任务：创建新游戏。
请严格按照上述规范创建游戏，确保 UI 风格和代码结构符合标准。

gameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Click Master</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #1a1a2e; /* Fallback for browsers that don't support gradients */
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        canvas {
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            display: block; /* Remove extra space below canvas */
        }

        /* Basic button styling (will be drawn on canvas for consistency) */
        .game-button {
            position: absolute;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #ffffff;
            background-color: #4fd1c5; /* Accent color */
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
            display: none; /* Hidden by default, canvas will manage visibility */
        }

        .game-button:hover {
            background-color: #3aa099;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="360" height="640"></canvas>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        // Game State
        const GAME_STATES = {
            MENU: 'menu',
            PLAYING: 'playing',
            PAUSED: 'paused',
            GAMEOVER: 'gameover'
        };
        let gameState = GAME_STATES.MENU;

        // Game Variables
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('clickMasterHighScore') || 0;
        let gameTime = 30; // seconds
        let timeLeft = gameTime;
        let lastFrameTime = 0;
        let targetInterval = 1000; // Time between new targets appearing (ms)
        let lastTargetSpawnTime = 0;

        const targets = [];
        const TARGET_SIZE = 60;
        const TARGET_LIFETIME = 1500; // ms
        const TARGET_SPAWN_DECAY_RATE = 0.95; // How much faster targets spawn over time
        const MIN_TARGET_INTERVAL = 400; // Minimum interval between targets

        // UI Colors
        const UI_TEXT_COLOR = '#ffffff';
        const UI_ACCENT_COLOR = '#4fd1c5';
        const UI_BUTTON_COLOR = '#4fd1c5';
        const UI_BUTTON_HOVER_COLOR = '#3aa099';
        const UI_BACKGROUND_GRADIENT = ['#1a1a2e', '#16213e'];

        // Game loop
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastFrameTime;
            lastFrameTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // --- Game Logic Update ---
        function update(deltaTime) {
            switch (gameState) {
                case GAME_STATES.MENU:
                    // No active game logic in menu
                    break;
                case GAME_STATES.PLAYING:
                    timeLeft -= deltaTime / 1000; // Decrease time left

                    if (timeLeft <= 0) {
                        gameState = GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER;
                        timeLeft = 0; // Ensure it doesn't go negative
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('clickMasterHighScore', highScore);
                        }
                    }

                    // Spawn new targets
                    lastTargetSpawnTime += deltaTime;
                    if (lastTargetSpawnTime >= targetInterval) {
                        spawnTarget();
                        lastTargetSpawnTime = 0;
                        // Gradually make targets appear faster
                        targetInterval = Math.max(MIN_TARGET_INTERVAL, targetInterval * TARGET_SPAWN_DECAY_RATE);
                    }

                    // Update and remove targets
                    for (let i = targets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                        const target = targets[i];
                        target.lifetime -= deltaTime;
                        if (target.lifetime <= 0) {
                            targets.splice(i, 1);
                            score = Math.max(0, score - 1); // Penalty for missing
                        }
                    }
                    break;
                case GAME_STATES.PAUSED:
                    // No active game logic when paused
                    break;
                case GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER:
                    // No active game logic after game over
                    break;
            }
        }

        // --- Game Rendering ---
        function render() {
            // Draw background
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, UI_BACKGROUND_GRADIENT[0]);
            gradient.addColorStop(1, UI_BACKGROUND_GRADIENT[1]);
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Draw Score
            ctx.font = '24px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText('Score:', canvas.width / 2 - 40, 40);
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_ACCENT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 40);

            // Draw High Score (always visible)
            ctx.font = '16px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText('High Score: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 70);

            switch (gameState) {
                case GAME_STATES.MENU:
                    drawMenu();
                    break;
                case GAME_STATES.PLAYING:
                    drawPlaying();
                    break;
                case GAME_STATES.PAUSED:
                    drawPlaying(); // Still show game elements
                    drawPausedOverlay();
                    break;
                case GAME_STATES.GAMEOVER:
                    drawPlaying(); // Still show game elements
                    drawGameOver();
                    break;
            }
        }

        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.font = '48px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText('Click Master', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);

            drawButton(canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2, 120, 50, 'Start Game', startGame);
        }

        function drawPlaying() {
            // Draw targets
            targets.forEach(target => {
                ctx.fillStyle = UI_ACCENT_COLOR;
                ctx.globalAlpha = target.lifetime / TARGET_LIFETIME; // Fade out
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.roundRect(target.x, target.y, TARGET_SIZE, TARGET_SIZE, 12);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1; // Reset alpha
            });

            // Draw Time Left
            ctx.font = '20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'right';
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText('Time: ' + Math.ceil(timeLeft), canvas.width - 20, 40);

            // Draw Pause button
            drawButton(canvas.width - 50, canvas.height - 40, 80, 40, 'Pause', pauseGame, 'small');
        }

        function drawPausedOverlay() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)'; // Semi-transparent overlay
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.font = '40px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText('Paused', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);

            drawButton(canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2, 120, 50, 'Resume', resumeGame);
        }

        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)'; // Semi-transparent overlay
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.font = '40px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.fillText('Game Over!', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);

            ctx.font = '24px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('Your Score: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3 + 60);

            drawButton(canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 50, 150, 50, 'Play Again', resetGame);
        }

        // Helper function to draw a button on canvas
        function drawButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClickCallback, size = 'normal') {
            const buttonX = x - width / 2;
            const buttonY = y - height / 2;

            ctx.fillStyle = UI_BUTTON_COLOR;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.roundRect(buttonX, buttonY, width, height, 12);
            ctx.fill();

            // Add shadow
            ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)';
            ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
            ctx.shadowOffsetX = 0;
            ctx.shadowOffsetY = 4;
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.shadowBlur = 0; // Reset shadow

            ctx.fillStyle = UI_TEXT_COLOR;
            ctx.font = (size === 'small' ? '16px' : '20px') + ' "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
            ctx.fillText(text, x, y);

            // Store button data for click detection
            buttons.push({ x: buttonX, y: buttonY, width: width, height: height, callback: onClickCallback });
        }
        const buttons = []; // Array to store clickable button regions for event handling

        // --- Input Handling ---
        function handleInput(event) {
            if (event.type === 'mousedown' || event.type === 'touchstart') {
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
                const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
                const clientX = event.type === 'mousedown' ? event.clientX : event.touches[0].clientX;
                const clientY = event.type === 'mousedown' ? event.clientY : event.touches[0].clientY;
                const mouseX = (clientX - rect.left) * scaleX;
                const mouseY = (clientY - rect.top) * scaleY;

                // Check for button clicks first
                for (let i = buttons.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                    const btn = buttons[i];
                    if (mouseX > btn.x && mouseX < btn.x + btn.width &&
                        mouseY > btn.y && mouseY < btn.y + btn.height) {
                        btn.callback();
                        buttons.length = 0; // Clear buttons after click to prevent multiple triggers
                        return; // Button was clicked, don't check targets
                    }
                }
                buttons.length = 0; // Clear buttons after rendering cycle

                // If no button clicked, check for target clicks (only in playing state)
                if (gameState === GAME_STATES.PLAYING) {
                    for (let i = targets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                        const target = targets[i];
                        if (mouseX > target.x && mouseX < target.x + TARGET_SIZE &&
                            mouseY > target.y && mouseY < target.y + TARGET_SIZE) {
                            score++;
                            targets.splice(i, 1); // Remove clicked target
                            break; // Only click one target at a time
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // --- Game State Transitions / Actions ---
        function startGame() {
            resetGameData();
            gameState = GAME_STATES.PLAYING;
            lastTargetSpawnTime = 0; // Reset spawn timer
            lastFrameTime = performance.now(); // Reset time for smooth start
        }

        function pauseGame() {
            if (gameState === GAME_STATES.PLAYING) {
                gameState = GAME_STATES.PAUSED;
            }
        }

        function resumeGame() {
            if (gameState === GAME_STATES.PAUSED) {
                gameState = GAME_STATES.PLAYING;
                lastFrameTime = performance.now(); // Reset lastFrameTime to prevent large deltaTime after pause
            }
        }

        function resetGame() {
            resetGameData();
            gameState = GAME_STATES.MENU;
        }

        function resetGameData() {
            score = 0;
            timeLeft = gameTime;
            targets.length = 0; // Clear all targets
            targetInterval = 1000; // Reset target spawn rate
        }

        function spawnTarget() {
            const x = Math.random() * (canvas.width - TARGET_SIZE);
            const y = Math.random() * (canvas.height - TARGET_SIZE - 100) + 100; // Avoid top score area
            targets.push({ x, y, lifetime: TARGET_LIFETIME });
        }


        // Event Listeners
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', handleInput);
        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', handleInput, { passive: true }); // Use passive for touch events for better performance

        // Start the game loop
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
